mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id, c.title, u.name, -- 강사 이름 c.class_id, cc.class_name, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.cos_sta_code FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON c.professor = u.loginID ORDER BY c.course_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON c.professor = u.loginID
AND c.cos_sta_code = #{cos_sta_code}
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

SELECT c.course_id, c.title,
p.name AS name, -- 강사명 sp.name AS subName, -- 보조강사명
c.professor, -- (loginID, 수정용) c.sub_prof, -- (loginID, 수정용)
c.class_id, cc.class_name, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.content, c.notice, c.plan, c.cos_sta_code, c.time_code, ct.start_time, ct.end_time, ts.status AS status FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time ct ON c.time_code = ct.time_code LEFT JOIN test_schedule ts ON c.course_id = ts.course_id
LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo p ON c.professor = p.loginID LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo sp ON c.sub_prof = sp.loginID
WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET title = #{title}, professor = #{professor}, sub_prof = #{sub_prof}, class_id = #{class_id}, start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date}, content = #{content}, notice = #{notice}, plan = #{plan}, time_code = #{time_code} WHERE course_id = #{course_id}
